# Prompt: Add a New Quest

Add a new quest type or quest content to the 9898-MTG Chaos RPG.

## Context

- Quests are generated by `src/generators/perchance.js` (procedural) and `src/ai/aiService.js` (AI-enhanced)
- Quest state is tracked in `gameState.state.quests[]`
- New quest _types_ go in the `quest` generator in `perchance.js`
- New AI-enhanced quests go in `generateAIQuest()` in `aiService.js`

## Quest Schema (in gameState)

```javascript
{
    id: 'quest-<timestamp>',
    title: 'Quest Display Title',
    objective: 'Primary objective description',
    status: 'active',        // 'active' | 'completed' | 'failed'
    progress: 0,             // 0–100
    rewards: ['Reward Name'],
    bonusObjectives: [],     // optional: [{description, completed}]
    moralChoice: null,       // optional: moral dilemma text
}
```

## Instructions

1. **For a simple generated quest**: Add items to the `quest` generator in `perchance.js`

    ```javascript
    // In initializeDefaultGenerators(), find addGenerator('quest', ...) and add:
    'Forge a pact with [enemy] to defeat a greater threat',
    'Recover [magicalItem] before it falls into enemy hands at [location]',
    ```

2. **For an AI-enhanced quest**: Edit `generateAIQuest()` in `aiService.js`
    - Add `bonusObjectives` for high-creativity personalities
    - Add `moralChoice` for moral dilemmas
    - Scale difficulty with personality `danger` value

3. **Rewards**: Reference the `reward` generator or add explicit rewards:
    ```javascript
    rewards: [perchanceGenerator.generate('reward'), 'Extra card draw'];
    ```

## Example AI Quest

```javascript
{
    title: 'The Silence of Kamigawa',
    objective: 'Investigate the sudden silence of the kami spirits',
    status: 'active',
    progress: 0,
    rewards: ['Spirit Lantern', '3 life'],
    bonusObjectives: [
        { description: 'Do not destroy any spirits', completed: false },
        { description: 'Complete before turn 5', completed: false },
    ],
    moralChoice: 'Bind the rogue kami (gain power) or release it (gain honor)?',
}
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Quest content added to generator or AI method
- [ ] Quest schema fields all present
- [ ] Rewards reference existing reward types
- [ ] Test added for new quest content
- [ ] `npm test` passes
